description: Maps Roslyn analyzer codes to dotnet-agent-harness skills

CA2007.title: Do not directly await a Task
CA2007.message: Consider using ConfigureAwait with appropriate context

CA2008.title: Do not create tasks without passing TaskScheduler
CA2008.message: Always specify TaskScheduler for control over task execution

CA2009.title: Do not remove the operator from a disposable type

RCS1174.title: Remove redundant async/await
RCS1174.message: Avoid async wrapper overhead by returning Task directly

RCS1229.title: Use async/await when necessary
RCS1229.message: Use proper async/await patterns for better stack traces

RCS1090.title: Add/remove ConfigureAwait(false)
RCS1090.message: Consider ConfigureAwait(false) for library code, keep context for UI

CA1816.title: Call GC.SuppressFinalize correctly
CA1816.message: Call GC.SuppressFinalize in Dispose to prevent finalizer overhead

CA1821.title: Remove empty finalizers
CA1821.message: Empty finalizers cause unnecessary GC pressure

CA2000.title: Dispose objects before losing scope
CA2000.message: Ensure proper disposal of IDisposable resources

CA2013.title: Do not use ReferenceEquals with value types
CA2013.message: Avoid boxing by not using ReferenceEquals with value types

CA2015.title: Do not define finalizers for MemoryManager<T>

RCS1261.title: Resource can be disposed asynchronously
RCS1261.message: Consider using IAsyncDisposable for async cleanup

CA1822.title: Mark members as static
CA1822.message: Non-virtual static calls are faster; mark as static if no instance data

CA1831.title: Use AsSpan instead of range-based indexers
CA1831.message: Use Span<T> for zero-copy string manipulation

CA1836.title: Prefer IsEmpty over Count
CA1836.message: IsEmpty is O(1) vs Count which may be O(n)

CA1854.title: Prefer TryGetValue over ContainsKey + indexer
CA1854.message: Dictionary lookup optimization: use single TryGetValue call

CA1859.title: Use concrete types when possible
CA1859.message: Enable devirtualization by using concrete types

CA1861.title: Avoid constant arrays as arguments
CA1861.message: Cache static readonly arrays instead of creating per-call

RCS1077.title: Optimize LINQ method call
RCS1077.message: Replace LINQ with more efficient alternatives

RCS1186.title: Use Regex instance instead of static
RCS1186.message: Cache Regex instances for better performance

CA2100.title: Review SQL queries for security vulnerabilities
CA2100.message: Prevent SQL injection: use parameterized queries

CA5350.title: Do not use weak cryptographic algorithms

CA5351.title: Do not use broken cryptographic algorithms
CA5351.message: Avoid broken algorithms: MD5, SHA-1, DES

CA3075.title: Insecure DTD processing in XML
CA3075.message: Secure XML processing: disable DTD processing

CA2153.title: Do not catch corrupted state exceptions
CA2153.message: Security exception handling: avoid catching critical exceptions

CA1001.title: Types that own disposable fields should be disposable
CA1001.message: Implement IDisposable pattern for resource management

CA1031.title: Do not catch general exception types
CA1031.message: Catch specific exceptions, not general Exception

CA1062.title: Validate arguments of public methods
CA1062.message: Defensive programming: validate arguments at public boundaries

CA1507.title: Use nameof in place of string
CA1507.message: Use nameof() for refactoring-safe string references

RCS1044.title: Remove original exception from throw
RCS1044.message: Preserve stack trace: throw; not throw ex;

RCS1075.title: Avoid empty catch clause
RCS1075.message: Test assertions: don't swallow exceptions silently

CA1826.title: Use property instead of LINQ Enumerable method
CA1826.message: EF Core optimization: translate to SQL

CA1827.title: Do not use Count when Any can be used

CA1828.title: Do not use CountAsync when AnyAsync can be used
CA1828.message: Async query efficiency: AnyAsync is more efficient

CA1416.title: Validate platform compatibility
CA1416.message: Platform checks: validate OS before native calls

CA1417.title: Do not use OutAttribute on string parameters
CA1417.message: Marshalling safety: avoid OutAttribute on strings

CA2255.title: ModuleInitializer should not be used in libraries
CA2255.message: Startup patterns: ModuleInitializer in apps only

CA2256.title: All parent interface members must have implementation
